text: Secreted Wnt ligand stimulates Wnt/beta-catenin signaling, in which beta-catenin is activated. Wnt ligand binds to Frizzled receptor, which leads to GSK3beta inactivation. GSK3beta inactivation leads to beta-catenin dephosphorylation, which avoids the ubiquitination of the beta-catenin and stabilizes the beta-catenin  ADDIN EN.CITE <EndNote><Cite><Author>Clevers&l &amp; Nusse, 2012)</DisplayText><record><rec-num app="EN" db-id="z0t2vdzwlt05d9ewr09vwwd85sdd5wtsarsd&q timestamp="1584950464">10</key> name="Journal Article">17</ref-type><contributo H.</author><author>Nusse, R.</author></authors></contributors Institute, KNAW and University Medical Center Utrecht, The Netherlands. h.clevers@hubrecht.eu</auth-address><titl signaling and disease</title><secondary-title>Cell&l Proteins/*metabolism</keyword><keyword&gt Signaling Pathway</keyword><keyword>beta Catenin/*metabolism</keyword></keywords&g 8</date></pub-dates></dates>< (Electronic)&#xD;0092-8674 (Linking)</isbn><accession-num>2268224 & Nusse, 2012). The translocation of stabilized beta-catenin induces the transcription of genes involved in proliferation (Pai et al., 2017).
